test.name: Abrir Navegador Visivel

kw.name: Start Chromedriver
kw.msg: ====== WebDriver manager ======
Get LATEST chromedriver version for google-chrome
Get LATEST chromedriver version for google-chrome
There is no [mac64] chromedriver "145.0.7632.117" for browser google-chrome "145.0.7632" in cache
Get LATEST chromedriver version for google-chrome
WebDriver version 145.0.7632.117 selected
Modern chrome version https://storage.googleapis.com/chrome-for-testing-public/145.0.7632.117/mac-x64/chromedriver-mac-x64.zip
About to download new driver from https://storage.googleapis.com/chrome-for-testing-public/145.0.7632.117/mac-x64/chromedriver-mac-x64.zip
Driver downloading response is 200
Get LATEST chromedriver version for google-chrome
Driver has been saved in cache [/Users/gustavo/.wdm/drivers/chromedriver/mac64/145.0.7632.117]
${remote} = http://localhost:61557

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Chromedriver remoto: http://localhost:61557
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: Opening browser 'chrome' to base url 'about:blank' through remote server at 'http://localhost:61557'.
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.msg: Slept 1 minute.
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.msg: Retrying (Retry(total=2, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=61557): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 61] Connection refused")': /session/0e9b1802f33049f9ef0a50ef7a57de1f

Retrying (Retry(total=1, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=61557): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 61] Connection refused")': /session/0e9b1802f33049f9ef0a50ef7a57de1f

Retrying (Retry(total=0, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=61557): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 61] Connection refused")': /session/0e9b1802f33049f9ef0a50ef7a57de1f

When closing browser, received exception: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=61557): Max retries exceeded with url: /session/0e9b1802f33049f9ef0a50ef7a57de1f (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=61557): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 61] Connection refused"))
Cannot capture screenshot because no browser is open.

MaxRetryError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=61557): Max retries exceeded with url: /session/0e9b1802f33049f9ef0a50ef7a57de1f (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=61557): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 61] Connection refused"))
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
kw.status: MaxRetryError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=61557): Max retries exceeded with url: /session/0e9b1802f33049f9ef0a50ef7a57de1f (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=61557): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 61] Connection refused"))

test.status: Teardown failed: MaxRetryError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=61557): Max retries exceeded with url: /session/0e9b1802f33049f9ef0a50ef7a57de1f (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=61557): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 61] Connection refused"))

errors.msg: Retrying (Retry(total=2, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=61557): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 61] Connection refused")': /session/0e9b1802f33049f9ef0a50ef7a57de1f

Retrying (Retry(total=1, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=61557): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 61] Connection refused")': /session/0e9b1802f33049f9ef0a50ef7a57de1f

Retrying (Retry(total=0, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=61557): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 61] Connection refused")': /session/0e9b1802f33049f9ef0a50ef7a57de1f

When closing browser, received exception: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=61557): Max retries exceeded with url: /session/0e9b1802f33049f9ef0a50ef7a57de1f (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=61557): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 61] Connection refused"))
